text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Happiness is here! Fortune has arrived!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What an amazingly lucky outcome! I took first! A
surprise victory for Matikanefukukitaru!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You didn't fail me, Trainer, and neither did the
great Shiraoki! Just as I thought...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: The heavens are always smiling upon me!
choice_data_list: Hey, don't get too carried away.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! No one can come close to rivaling one such
as me! And that's no exaggeration!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What a joyous occasion! Which is why...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I want you to have this as a thank-you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's a lucky charm that helps with taking the bones out of your sea bream. It's to celebrate the joy that has me bream-ing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not too sure about the gift, but I appreciate
the sentiment nonetheless!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Argh! I know that, obviously! I'm not getting
carried away, really!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Well, I am being carried by this wave of good luck, though! Ehehe!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And it's thanks to your guidance that I'm able to
ride that wave! On that note...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I want you to have this as a thank-you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's a lucky charm that helps you befriend surfers!
That way you can catch some gnarly waves of
your own!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not too sure about the gift, but I appreciate
the sentiment nonetheless!
